new_bicep_module.description_template:
Create a new Bicep module for {service_name} at deploy/bicep/{landing_zone}/modules/{service_name}/{service_name}.bicep.

Requirements:
- SystemAssigned managed identity
- Private endpoint support (conditional on parameter)
- Diagnostic settings to Log Analytics (conditional)
- Parameter decorators (@description, @allowed, etc.)
- Outputs: resourceId, resourceName, managedIdentityPrincipalId

Follow existing pattern in deploy/bicep/DLZ/modules/synapse/synapse.bicep

new_dbt_model.description_template:
Create a new dbt {layer} model at domains/{domain}/dbt/models/{layer}/{model_name}.sql.

Requirements:
- Follow medallion architecture conventions
- Bronze: incremental with merge, add audit columns
- Silver: dedup, type cast, data quality flags
- Gold: table materialization, business metrics
- Add schema.yml entry with tests
- Add source definition if needed

new_data_domain.description_template:
Set up a new data domain following the Data Mesh pattern.

1. Copy template: cp -r templates/data-product/scaffold domains/{domain_name}
2. Configure dbt_project.yml with domain name
3. Define sources in models/bronze/sources.yml
4. Create at least one bronze → silver → gold pipeline
5. Define data product contract
6. Register in Purview
7. Update CODEOWNERS

new_adf_pipeline.description_template:
Create an ADF pipeline definition at domains/{domain}/pipelines/adf/{pipeline_name}.json.

Requirements:
- Valid ARM template JSON
- Parameterized (factory name, connection strings)
- Error handling (retry, alerting)
- Metadata logging (timestamps, row counts)

bug_fix.description_template:
Bug fix: {description}

Steps:
1. Reproduce the issue
2. Identify root cause
3. Implement fix
4. Add test to prevent regression
5. Validate with relevant gate scripts
